'''Relus''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Beshqek system]], located within the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. It was one of two terrestrial planets in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] and was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="BDC1" />

After the cataclysmic [[Destruction of Byss|destruction]] of Relus's neighboring planet, [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], the artificial [[Byss Run/Legends|Byss Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connecting the Beshqek system to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] began to collapse. Millions of Relus's inhabitants fled to nearby [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]] and beyond in an attempt to avoid being trapped in the system. Millions more, however, were believed to have been marooned on Relus when the Byss Run finally collapsed completely, leaving the Beshqek system all but unreachable.<ref name="Atlas" />

==Behind the scenes==
Relus was first referenced in the [[Planet Hoppers]] article ''[[Byss and the Deep Core]]'' by [[Rodney Thompson]] in [[2005]], which first identified each of Byss's neighboring planets in the Beshqek system.<ref name="BDC1" /> The planet was later tied into Byss's destruction in the [[2009]] reference work ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]].<ref name="Atlas" />
